steps.title: Apply curated parameter recovery only after review
instructions: Build curated override files from the reviewed batch mapping packs.
Apply overrides with npm run products:apply:parameter-curated-overrides only after the parameter ids are finalized.

steps.title: Apply category/schema normalization only after explicit review
instructions: Confirm /tmp/product-parameter-curated-build-latest.json shows only the approved family packs as ready.
Apply the resulting curated overrides only after the category/schema decision is finalized.

steps.title: Build ready curated override bundle from completed family mapping packs
Apply the latest ready curated override bundle
Apply UI consolidation changes through targeted feature migrations
instructions: This track intentionally stops at the shared backlog and guardrail surface.
Implement migrations in the owning feature areas instead of using the improvement runner for blind UI rewrites.

steps.title: Apply performance fixes through targeted implementation work
instructions: This track is read-only and should guide optimization work rather than attempt blind fixes.
Implement the chosen remediation in the owning code and then re-run the fast gate or baseline lane.

steps.title: Apply repo-wide quality fixes manually
instructions: This track is read-only by default.
Run targeted fix commands explicitly instead of using the improvement runner for blind write-side quality changes.
